caption: A man with short, dark hair and a trimmed beard is seated in a recording studio, wearing black over-ear headphones and a black zip-up hoodie over a grey shirt. He is positioned behind a professional condenser microphone mounted on a boom arm. The background consists of dark, ribbed acoustic foam panels arranged in a textured wall. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, looking toward his left. His expression shifts slightly, with his eyes moving as if tracking someone or something off-screen. He begins with a neutral gaze, looks slightly upward and further to the side, and then returns to a more centered focus. His mouth remains closed, and he does not interact with any equipment. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
